metaDescription: Full menu of barber and hair services at A Cut Above Barber Shop in San Clemente: military and regulation cuts, straight razor fades and lineups, beard trims and straight razor shaves, gentleman's cuts, women's haircuts, color and highlights, and custom designs.

header.title: A full menu, finished with care.
header.subtitle: A complete range of barber and hair services for men and women. Every visit includes attention to detail in a clean, comfortable environment.

steps.title: Call or text
steps.body: Reach us at the shop number. Tell us the service you want and your preferred barber.

steps.title: Show up sharp
steps.body: Walk in or stop by your scheduled time. Grab a complimentary drink and relax.

steps.title: Leave refreshed
steps.body: Sharp cut, hot-towel finish where it fits, and you're out the door confident.

ctaHeading: Pick your service. We'll handle the rest.
